treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Desensitization protocol for chemotherapy cycles, included administration of hydrocortisone and Benadryl for allergic reaction
treatment_information.treatment_response: Tolerated the treatments without incident after initial allergic reaction

treatment_timeline.event: Initial allergic reaction to carboplatin during cycle 2, leading to discontinuation and desensitization treatment
Admitted to ICU for cycles 3 and 4 of carboplatin desensitization
Readmitted to ICU for desensitization for cycle 5 without incident
Directly admitted to ICU for carboplatin desensitization for cycle 6
Tolerated desensitization for cycle 6 without allergic event

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Please follow up with your doctors as indicated
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Tolerated desensitization well, no allergic events
